description: The Clan dei Corleonesi was a faction within Cosa Nostra formed in the 1970s, led by bosses from Corleone such as Luciano Liggio, Salvatore Riina, Bernardo Provenzano, and Leoluca Bagarella. It opposed the Palermo faction during the Second Mafia War in the early 1980s, eventually taking over the organization and initiating a period of attacks against the Italian state. The faction included mafia representatives from other provinces, like Nitto Santapaola and Francesco Messina Denaro.
